8901.issue: [S8901] Dependabot configuration file ".github/dependabot.yml" not found. Consider adding dependabot to keep dependencies up to date.

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.8.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/Marco15453/ioBroker.cloudflare/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
